products.name: Bavovna AI Navigation Kit
products.descriptor: AI-powered INS kit with edge hardware and SaaS model for GNSS-denied UAV navigation

evidence.snippet:
Bavovna is a dual-use AI-driven alternative navigation for Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles operating in GNSS-denied and electronic warfare-threatened environments.
Bavovna combines modular hardware and SaaS AI for aerial, surface, and subsurface UV platforms to address malicious and natural challenges to Position, Navigation, and Timing (PNT) systems.
[Bavovna AI Navigation Kit](https://bavovna.ai/ai-navigation-kit/)

Sensor fusion from the onboard IMU array and airspeed provided navigation. We use sensors like a compass and barometer, with analysis performed on the edge using Bavovna AI Navigation Kit. We use a proprietary Kalman filtration algorithm and fine-tuned sensor fusion neural network trained on 100 hours of fight logs minimum.

products.name: Bavovna Multivector AirFlow Sensor
products.descriptor: Multi-directional airflow sensor for UAV navigation and flight stability

evidence.snippet:
Getting Superior UAV control with Bavovna’s Multivector AirFlow Sensor
----------------------------------------------------------------------
For UAV developers, airflow sensing only matters if it delivers reliable control gains without adding integration friction. [Bavovna’s Multivector AirFlow Sensor](https://bavovna.ai/airflow-sensor/) was designed with that reality in mind.
Our sensor was designed to provide a continuous, multi-directional view of how the UAV is interacting with the air, providing flight controllers with a more physically grounded input.

products.name: SIGINT RF Module
products.descriptor: RF signals-intelligence module for EM threat reconnaissance and EW obstacle bypass

evidence.snippet: Intended for dual use, Bavovna’s hardware sits in an EMI-protected case and can be further augmented with a SIGINT RF module for bypassing EW and EM obstacles. AI pilot system, not only enables more reliable autonomous navigation but also improves obstacle detection, UAV routing, and ultimately operating efficiencies.

products.name: AirTower
products.descriptor: Bavovna ground-based tower product for UAV navigation support

evidence.snippet: The Airtower use case needs to be covered.

products.name: Bavovna Mission Planner
products.descriptor: Mission planning software for GPS-denied/EW-threatened UAV operations, Ardupilot-based

evidence.snippet:
Mission Planner:
The Bavovna Mission Planner displays Bavovna as an optional Al-powered navigation system to allow mission execution through GPS-denied / EW-threatened areas while offering an advanced API and Ul based on the Ardupilot open-source platform

products.name: Multivector AirFlow Sensor for UAV
products.descriptor: 360-degree multi-directional airflow sensor with 6–9 pressure elements replacing Pitot tubes

evidence.snippet:
Multivector AirFlow Sensor for UAV
==================================
The Multi-directional Airflow Sensor, developed and patented by Bavovna Inc., is a multi-platform sensor designed specifically for UAVs. Engineered to replace traditional Pitot tubes, offering enhanced capabilities for precise navigation and drift control for various UAV and aerial platforms, including helicopters, multicopters, fixed-wings and VTOLs

products.name: AI AirTower Mode
products.descriptor: GNSS-denied autonomous hover-ascend-and-return flight mode for UAVs

evidence.snippet:
-------------------------
AI AirTower flight mode enables a UAV to autonomously ascend to the set height, hover, and return to a designated landing point without GNSS or maps. The endpoint positioning error during field tests was about 0.5%. The system also supports autonomous take-off, landing, and return to home with a single point positioning ±1m latitude.

products.name: Bavovna AirTower with Aurelia X6 Max Pro-D
products.descriptor: AI-augmented hexacopter UAV for EW-resilient air tower, ISR, and radio relay missions

evidence.snippet: Bavovna AirTower with Aurelia X6 Max Pro-D
AirTower mode was originally developed and tested on Aurelia X6 Max Pro-D — one of the best enterprise drones in its category. It can be also adapted to a wide range of other UAV and ROV models.
